entities.name: B27 - KEY_MESSAGING
entities.context: Strategic messaging framework for generating 5-10 reusable narrative blurbs after meetings

entities.name: B13 - PLAN_OF_ACTION
entities.context: Action planning framework with confidence levels, immediate/near-term structure, and checkpoints

entities.name: MOMENTUM
entities.context: Section tracking positive signals and watch points, replaces old B16

entities.name: Detection phrases
entities.context: Trigger phrases like 'send me a blurb' or 'I'll introduce you' that activate blurb generation

entities.name: Forwarding-ready blurb
entities.context: 1-2 paragraph output format suitable for introductions

entities.name: Value prop
entities.context: Type of narrative blurb for communicating value proposition

entities.name: Technical credibility
entities.context: Type of narrative blurb for establishing technical expertise

entities.name: Mission alignment
entities.context: Type of narrative blurb for showing shared mission/values

entities.name: Differentiation
entities.context: Type of narrative blurb for competitive positioning

entities.name: Positive Signals
entities.context: Subsection of MOMENTUM tracking detailed questions, timeline compression, resource allocation, enthusiasm

entities.name: Watch Points
entities.context: Subsection of MOMENTUM for tracking concerns or risks

relationships.context: Detection phrases trigger generation of forwarding-ready blurbs
KEY_MESSAGING generates blurbs including forwarding-ready format
